description: You are a backend developer optimizing a slow inventory report in a Python/SQLAlchemy application located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/inventory_system`. The function `generate_valuation_report` in `inventory/report.py` currently executes over 2,500 SQL queries due to N+1 issues. Refactor this function to reduce the total query count to under 10 while maintaining the exact same output format (list of dicts). Do not modify the tests, data generation, or models.
